intro_highlights.text: It is natural to ask: what is the optimal strategy in repeated interactions?
intro_highlights.why_good: 问题驱动型引言中的“核心问题句”。

intro_highlights.text: Can such an optimal strategy be computed efficiently?
intro_highlights.why_good: 将研究问题自然转化为可计算性问题。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 多智能体现实场景引出最优策略问题。
正结果与负结果并行陈述。
